description.para: Register sets of MIPI DSI Tx

sectiondef.header: Core configuration register masks and shifts

description.para: This register is used for the enabling/disabling and resetting the core of DSI Tx Controller

briefdescription.para: Shift for selection of command/video mode.

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and shifts of Protocol control register

description.para: This register reports the number of lanes configured during core generation and number of lanes actively used.
This register used to get Command Queue Vacancy
This register used to set timing parameters HSA and BLLP
This register used to set timing parameters

briefdescription.para: Horizontal timing parameter HACT Bit Mask.

description.para: This register used to set timing parameters

briefdescription.para: Horizontal timing parameter HBP Bit Mask.

description.para: This register used to set Vertical timing parameters
This register used to set Extended vertical timing parameters It stores MSB 8-bits of 16-bit Vertical front porch lines count.

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and offsets of XDSI_GIER_OFFSET register

description.para: This register contains the global interrupt enable bit.

briefdescription.para: Shift bits for Global Interrupt Enable.

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and offsets of XDSI_ISR_OFFSET register

description.para: This register contains the interrupt status.

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and offsets of XDSI_IER_OFFSET register

description.para: This register contains the interrupt enable masks

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and offsets of XDSI_COMMAND_OFFSET register

description.para: This register contains the short packet command TBD as now

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and offsets of XDSI_LTIME_OFFSET register

description.para: This register contains the Total Line Time

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and offsets of XDSI_BBLP_SIZE_OFFSET register

description.para: This register contains the BLLP Time duration

briefdescription.para: Inline function to read DSI controller register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of DSI

briefdescription.para: Inline Function to write to DSI controller register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of DSI
is the value to be written to the register.
